reasoning: The document suffers from significant content loss and structural degradation that the pipeline's heuristic failed to capture. LLM fidelity signals indicate a 25% loss of content, including critical financial data and specific agenda items (8a), which is corroborated by a low programmatic shingling recall (0.795). Furthermore, the primary agenda table is severely corrupted, with columns merged and the second page converted into a simple list, destroying the intended visual and structural organization.

concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: The conversion fails to capture substantial specific details within the agenda items. Specifically, in Tab 5 (Consent Agenda), all financial data including Month-End Balances, Disbursements, and Encumbered Funds for the NG 911, CMRS, PSAP, and Grant funds are missing. Additionally, sub-items under Tab 5f (Monthly Reports and Mitchell County Grant) are omitted. On Page 2, sub-item 8a (FY 2021 Proposed PSAP Distribution) is entirely missing. concerns.location: Tab 5 (Consent Agenda) on Page 1 and Tab 8 (Funding Committee Report) on Page 2

concerns.analysis: The table structure is significantly corrupted. In the first page table (reading_order 4), the 'Topic' and 'Presenter' columns are merged into single cells (e.g., 'Call to Order...Eric Boyette'). Additionally, the 'Tab' column is only recognized for items 1-6; for the introductory items, the whole row is treated as one cell. Most critically, the second page of the table (items 7-13) is not rendered as a table at all, but converted into an unordered list (reading_order 11), losing the 'Tab/Topic/
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The source document contains a consistent 3-column table (Tab, Topic, Presenter) spanning two pages.
concerns.output_quote: The output merges columns on page 1 (e.g., cell content 'Call to Order...........................................................................................Eric Boyette') and converts the remainder of the table on page 2 into an unordered list (reading_order 11).

concerns.analysis: The visual organization of the document is significantly altered. The source PDF utilizes a consistent three-column table ('Tab', 'Topic', 'Presenter') for all agenda items across both pages. In the HTML output, this structure is broken: the first six items are in a table with incorrect column alignment, while sub-items (5a-f, 6a-g) and all items from the second page (7-13) are extracted and rendered as simple bulleted lists. concerns.source_pdf_quote: The source PDF maintains a 3-column table layout for items 7 through 13 on page 2.
concerns.output_quote: The HTML screenshot renders items 7 through 13 as a bulleted list starting with 'Education Committee Report...' instead of a table.

concerns.analysis: The table rendering in the HTML is fundamentally broken. Column alignment is incorrect, as the 'Presenter' column is rendered empty while the presenter names (e.g., 'Eric Boyette') are merged into the 'Tab' or 'Topic' cells. Furthermore, there is significant data loss within the rendered table/list; the financial figures (account balances and disbursements) for all sub-items in section 5 are completely missing from the HTML screenshot.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Item 5b: 'April 2020 Month-End Balance $ 66,897,707' and Item 1 'Presenter' column containing 'Eric Boyette'.
concerns.output_quote: Item 5b appears only as 'b) NG 911 Fund/Account' with no financial data. In the table, Item 1 'Topic' cell contains 'Chair’s Opening Remarks...Eric Boyette' and the 'Presenter' column is empty.
concerns.location: Agenda Table, Item 1 and Item 5 sub-list

concerns.analysis: The nesting within lists is incomplete. Under item 5 (Consent Agenda), the sub-items 5b, 5c, 5d, and 5e have specific financial data (Month-End Balances and Disbursements) in the source which are omitted in the output. Furthermore, the sub-items i and ii under 5f ('Monthly Reports per PSAP' and 'Mitchell County...') are missing from the list item entirely.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: f) Grant Project Updates per Reports\r\ni. Monthly Reports per PSAP\r\nii. Mitchell County Grant Extension Request

action_items: Restore missing financial data for the NG 911, CMRS, PSAP, and Grant funds in Tab 5.
Reconstruct the 3-column table structure for all agenda items to ensure Presenter names are correctly associated with Topics.
Locate and reintegrate missing agenda item 8a (FY 2021 Proposed PSAP Distribution).
Fix sub-item nesting and missing text under Tab 5f.
